description: Investigate the effect of solidity on Vertical Axis Wind Turbine (VAWT) performance by designing and simulating two H-Darrieus rotors. Use a NACA 0018 airfoil with an XFoil analysis (Re=300,000, Ncrit=9) extrapolated to 360 degrees. Design 'Rotor A' (3 blades, Radius 2m, Height 4m, Chord 0.15m) and 'Rotor B' (3 blades, Radius 2m, Height 4m, Chord 0.30m). Perform DMS simulations for both rotors over a TSR range of 1-6. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/projects/solidity_study.wpa and create a report at /home/ga/Documents/projects/solidity_report.txt stating the Max Cp and Optimal TSR for both rotors, noting which rotor has the lower optimal TSR.
